checklist.criterion: Uses rule-oriented format (declarative statements), not Given/When/Then format
Covers the size limit boundary: exactly 10MB is accepted, files exceeding 10MB are rejected
Covers format validation: non-PDF files are rejected with an error visible to the user
Covers the virus scan flow: uploaded file is in a pending/unavailable state until scan completes
Error messages are explicitly described as user-visible (not logged internally only)
Covers the success path: valid PDF under 10MB is accepted and becomes available after passing scan
No implementation details about scan technology, storage service, or virus scanner vendor
Includes an explicit Out of Scope section
All criteria formatted as checkbox items (- [ ] ...)
No vague language such as 'appropriate error', 'handled correctly', or 'quickly' in any criterion
